---
title: "External Arrears in Fund Programs (IDS x MONA)"
subtitle: "BP3 - Fund's Role in International Debt Architecture"
output: html_notebook
---

# Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(data.table)
library(openxlsx)
library(scales)
cat("Libraries loaded\n")
```

```{r paths}
ids_dir             <- "U:/dil/input/IDS"
characteristics_dir <- "U:/dil/main-characteristics"
mona_dir            <- "U:/dil/input/mona-description"
output_dir          <- "U:/dil/bp3/output/arrears-lioa-lia/charts"
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

---

# 1. LOAD IDS (6 Excel files)

```{r load-ids}
files <- c("A_D.xlsx", "E_K.xlsx", "L_M.xlsx", "N_Q.xlsx", "R_U.xlsx", "V_Z.xlsx") 
ids_list <- list()
for (f in files) {
  cat("Loading", f, "...\n")
  ids_list[[f]] <- read.xlsx(file.path(ids_dir, f))
  cat("  done:", format(nrow(ids_list[[f]]), big.mark = ","), "rows\n")
}
year_cols <- names(ids_list[[1]])[grepl("^\\d{4}$", names(ids_list[[1]]))]
for (i in seq_along(ids_list)) {
  ids_list[[i]][year_cols] <- lapply(ids_list[[i]][year_cols], as.character)
}
ids_raw <- bind_rows(ids_list)
rm(ids_list); gc()
cat("\nCombined:", format(nrow(ids_raw), big.mark = ","), "rows |",
    n_distinct(ids_raw$Country.Name), "countries\n")
```

# Filter to arrears series

```{r filter-series}
keep_series <- c(
  #Principal arrears official + interests
  "DT.AXA.OFFT.CD", 
  "DT.IXA.OFFT.CD",
  
  #Principal arrears private + interests
  "DT.AXA.PRVT.CD", 
  "DT.IXA.PRVT.CD",
  
  "DT.AXA.DLXF.CD", #cross check
  "DT.IXA.DLXF.CD" #cross check
  #"DT.IXA.DPPG.CD.CG"
)
ids_raw <- ids_raw %>% filter(Series.Code %in% keep_series)
cat("Filtered:", format(nrow(ids_raw), big.mark = ","), "rows\n")
ids_raw %>% count(Series.Code, Series.Name) %>% print(n = Inf)
```

# Remove aggregates

```{r remove-aggregates}
remove_these <- c(
  "East Asia & Pacific (excluding high income)",
  "Europe & Central Asia (excluding high income)",
  "IDA only", "IDA total",
  "Latin America & Caribbean (excluding high income)",
  "Least developed countries: UN classification",
  "Low & middle income", "Low income", "Lower middle income",
  "Middle East & North Africa (excluding high income)",
  "Middle East, North Africa, Afghanistan & Pakistan (excluding high income)",
  "Middle income", "South Asia",
  "Sub-Saharan Africa (excluding high income)",
  "Upper middle income",
  "Heavily indebted poor countries (HIPC)", "World"
)
ids_raw <- ids_raw %>% filter(!Country.Name %in% remove_these)
cat("Countries:", n_distinct(ids_raw$Country.Name), "\n")
```


# Reshape

```{r reshape}
year_cols <- names(ids_raw)[grepl("^\\d{4}$", names(ids_raw))]
ids_long <- ids_raw %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(year_cols), names_to = "year", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(year), value = as.numeric(value)) %>%
  filter(year >= 1970, year <= 2024, !is.na(value)) %>%
  rename(country_code = Country.Code, country_name = Country.Name,
         ca_name = `Counterpart-Area.Name`, ca_code = `Counterpart-Area.Code`,
         series_name = Series.Name, series_code = Series.Code) %>%
  mutate(ca_name = trimws(ca_name), country_code = trimws(country_code))
rm(ids_raw); gc()
cat("ids_long:", format(nrow(ids_long), big.mark = ","), "rows\n")
```

# PRGT classification

```{r prgt}
chars <- read.xlsx(file.path(characteristics_dir, "country-characteristics.xlsx"), sheet = "main")

lic_iso <- trimws(chars$iso)
lic_iso <- lic_iso[!is.na(lic_iso) & lic_iso != ""]

ids_long <- ids_long %>%
  mutate(income_group = if_else(country_code %in% lic_iso, "LIC", "MIC"))

cat("LIC:", n_distinct(ids_long$country_code[ids_long$income_group == "LIC"]),
    "| MIC:", n_distinct(ids_long$country_code[ids_long$income_group == "MIC"]), "\n")


```

---
# 3. Arrears Panel (WLD) OFFT & PRVT

```{r arrears-panel}
core_series <- c("DT.AXA.OFFT.CD", "DT.AXA.PRVT.CD",
                  "DT.IXA.OFFT.CD", "DT.IXA.PRVT.CD")

arrears_n1 <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code %in% core_series, ca_code == "WLD", year >= 1989) %>%
  mutate(creditor_type = if_else(str_detect(series_code, "OFFT"), "Official", "Private")) %>%
  group_by(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, creditor_type) %>%
  summarise(arrears = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = creditor_type, values_from = arrears,
              names_prefix = "arrears_", values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(arrears_total = arrears_Official + arrears_Private)
```

---
# 4. Export to Excel Arrears Panel (WLD) OFFT & PRVT

```{r arrears-panel-export}
#arrears_n1
write.csv(arrears_n1, file.path(output_dir, "arrears_n1_panel.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```

---
# 5. Ex1 Ex2, Charts

```{r charts-ex1-prvt}
# Aggregate for quick verification
ex1_inc <- arrears_n1 %>%
  filter(year >= 1989) %>%
  group_by(year, income_group) %>%
  summarise(sum_mn = sum(arrears_Private, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6, .groups = "drop")

# Quick chart - just display, no save
ggplot(ex1_inc, aes(x = year, y = sum_mn, fill = income_group)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.85, position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("LIC" = "#d6604d", "MIC" = "#67a9cf"), name = "Income Group") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar_format(suffix = "M")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1990, 2025, 5)) +
  labs(title = "Ex1: Private Arrears — LIC vs MIC (sum)", 
       subtitle = "Principal + interest, US$ millions",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
```

```{r charts-ex2-pub}
ex2_inc <- arrears_n1 %>%
  filter(year >= 1989) %>%
  group_by(year, income_group) %>%
  summarise(sum_mn = sum(arrears_Official, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6, .groups = "drop")

ggplot(ex2_inc, aes(x = year, y = sum_mn, fill = income_group)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.85, position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("LIC" = "#d6604d", "MIC" = "#67a9cf"), name = "Income Group") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar_format(suffix = "M")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1990, 2025, 5)) +
  labs(title = "Ex2: Official Arrears — LIC vs MIC (sum)",
       subtitle = "Principal + interest, US$ millions",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14))
```


---
# 6. Nivel 2 Official

```{r nivel2-codes}

# PC bilateral (time-varying)
pc_mapping <- tribble(
  ~ca_code,  ~pc_name,              ~accession_year,
  "801",     "Australia",           1956,
  "001",     "Austria",             1956,
  "002",     "Belgium",             1956,
  "301",     "Canada",              1956,
  "003",     "Denmark",             1956,
  "018",     "Finland",             1956,
  "004",     "France",              1956,
  "005",     "Germany, Fed. Rep.",   1956,
  "021",     "Ireland",             1956,
  "006",     "Italy",               1956,
  "701",     "Japan",               1956,
  "007",     "Netherlands",         1956,
  "008",     "Norway",              1956,
  "050",     "Spain",               1956,
  "010",     "Sweden",              1956,
  "011",     "Switzerland",         1956,
  "012",     "United Kingdom",      1956,
  "302",     "United States",       1956,
  "087",     "Russian Federation",  1997,
  "546",     "Israel",              2014,
  "742",     "Korea, Republic of",  2016,
  "431",     "Brazil",              2016
)

#Preffered creditor status codes
pcs_codes <- c(
  "901",  # World Bank-IBRD
  "905",  # World Bank-IDA
  "902",  # World Bank-MIGA
  "903",  # IFC
  "988",  # IFAD
  "911",  # BIS
  "990",  # EBRD
  "913",  # African Dev. Bank
  "915",  # Asian Dev. Bank
  "909",  # Inter-American Dev. Bank
  "899",  # AIIB
  "926",  # Council of Europe
  "906",  # Caribbean Dev. Bank
  "919",  # European Investment Bank
  "887",  # NDB
  "976",  # Islamic Dev. Bank
  "920",  # CAF
  "951",  # OPEC Fund
  "973",  # Arab Monetary Fund
  "953",  # BADEA
  "907",  # IMF
  "957"   # BOAD
)

# Non-PCS multilateral (institutions, not countries)
non_pcs_codes <- c(
  "921",  # AFESD
  "910",  # BCIE
  "918",  # EDF
  "917",  # EEC
  "817",  # TDB
  "815",  # Afrexim
  "993",  # BDEAC
  "997",  # ECOWAS
  "888",  # ECGLC
  "971",  # BCEAO
  "950",  # Nordic Dev Fund
  "922",  # Arab African Intl Bank
  "952",  # OAPEC
  "966",  # WFP
  "969",  # Nordic Investment Bank
  "898",  # Plata Basin
  "948",  # Entente Council
  "893",  # ECO Trade and Dev Bank
  "927",  # EUROFIMA
  "946",  # LAAD
  "895",  # ICO
  "904",  # IIB
  "890",  # ALBA
  "970",  # UMOA
  "924",  # ECSC
  "983",  # ATO
  "019",  # WTO
  "816",  # CARICOM
  "892",  # FLAR
  "939",  # COLAC
  "877",  # IBEC
  "808",  # UNGA
  "878",  # UN-RPTC
  "947",  # Arab League
  "980",  # Arab Fund Tech Assist
  "959",  # UNDP
  "958",  # European Relief Fund
  "961",  # ESF
  "967",  # UNHCR
  "974",  # UNFPA
  "975",  # EU
  "977",  # Eurasian Dev Bank
  "978",  # NEFCO
  "979",  # ISFD
  "991",  # SADF
  "237"   # East African Community
)



# Exclude
exclude_codes <- c("WLD", "994")  # WLD = total, 994 = Multiple Lenders

cat("PC:", nrow(pc_mapping), "| PCS:", length(pcs_codes), 
    "| Non-PCS:", length(non_pcs_codes))
```

---
```{r mapeo-nivel2-codes}
offt_detail <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code %in% c("DT.AXA.OFFT.CD", "DT.IXA.OFFT.CD"),
         !ca_code %in% exclude_codes,
         ca_code != "WLD",
         year >= 1989) %>%
  mutate(ca_code = trimws(ca_code))

offt_classified <- offt_detail %>%
  left_join(pc_mapping %>% select(ca_code, accession_year), by = "ca_code") %>%
  mutate(
    creditor_class = case_when(
      ca_code %in% pcs_codes                           ~ "Multilateral: PCS",
      ca_code %in% non_pcs_codes                       ~ "Multilateral: Non-PCS",
      !is.na(accession_year) & year >= accession_year  ~ "Bilateral: Paris Club",
      !is.na(accession_year) & year <  accession_year  ~ "Bilateral: Non-Paris Club",
      TRUE                                             ~ "Bilateral: Non-Paris Club"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-accession_year)

# Distribution check
offt_classified %>%
  group_by(creditor_class) %>%
  summarise(n_counterparts = n_distinct(ca_code),
            n_countries    = n_distinct(country_code),
            total_mn       = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6,
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_mn)) %>%
  print()

```


---
```{r verify-nivel2-codes}
# All counterparts that fell into the catch-all (TRUE ~)
catch_all <- offt_classified %>%
  filter(creditor_class == "Bilateral: Non-Paris Club",
         !ca_code %in% pc_mapping$ca_code) %>%
  group_by(ca_code, ca_name) %>%
  summarise(total_mn = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6, .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total_mn))

cat("Counterparts in catch-all (should all be countries):", nrow(catch_all), "\n\n")
catch_all %>% print(n = Inf)

```

---
# 7. Aggregate Nivel 2 Official

```{r nivel2-aggregate}
arrears_n2_offt <- offt_classified %>%
  group_by(country_name, country_code, year, income_group, creditor_class) %>%
  summarise(arrears = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

cat("N2 Official panel:", format(nrow(arrears_n2_offt), big.mark = ","), "rows |",
    n_distinct(arrears_n2_offt$country_code), "countries\n")

arrears_n2_offt
write.csv(arrears_n2_offt, file.path(output_dir, "arrears_n2_official.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r nivel2-aggregate-graph}

arrears_n2_offt %>%
  group_by(year, creditor_class) %>%
  summarise(sum_mn = sum(arrears, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6, .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = sum_mn, fill = creditor_class)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.85, position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Bilateral: Paris Club"      = "#2166ac",
    "Bilateral: Non-Paris Club"  = "#67a9cf",
    "Multilateral: PCS"          = "#1b7837",
    "Multilateral: Non-PCS"      = "#7fbf7b"
  ), name = "Creditor Class") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar_format(suffix = "M")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1990, 2025, 5)) +
  labs(title = "N2: Official Arrears by Creditor Class (sum)",
       subtitle = "Principal + interest, US$ millions",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2))
```

```{r nivel2-aggregate-verify}
arrears_n2_offt %>%
  group_by(year, creditor_class) %>%
  summarise(sum_mn = round(sum(arrears, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6, 0), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = creditor_class, values_from = sum_mn, values_fill = 0) %>%
  print(n = Inf, width = Inf)

```


---
# 8. Nivel 2 Private

```{r nivel2-private}
# Bonds: from counterpart BND
prvt_bonds <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code %in% c("DT.AXA.PRVT.CD", "DT.IXA.PRVT.CD"),
         ca_code == "BND",
         year >= 1989) %>%
  group_by(country_name, country_code, year, income_group) %>%
  summarise(bonds = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Total private: from WLD
prvt_total <- ids_long %>%
  filter(series_code %in% c("DT.AXA.PRVT.CD", "DT.IXA.PRVT.CD"),
         ca_code == "WLD",
         year >= 1989) %>%
  group_by(country_name, country_code, year, income_group) %>%
  summarise(prvt_total = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Other private = total - bonds
arrears_n2_prvt <- prvt_total %>%
  left_join(prvt_bonds, by = c("country_name", "country_code", "year", "income_group")) %>%
  mutate(bonds = replace_na(bonds, 0),
         other_private = prvt_total - bonds,
         other_private = pmax(other_private, 0))

cat("N2 Private panel:", format(nrow(arrears_n2_prvt), big.mark = ","), "rows |",
    n_distinct(arrears_n2_prvt$country_code), "countries\n")

arrears_n2_prvt
write.csv(arrears_n2_prvt, file.path(output_dir, "arrears_n2_private.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r nivel2-private-graph}
arrears_n2_prvt %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(Bonds = sum(bonds, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6,
            Other_Private = sum(other_private, na.rm = TRUE) / 1e6, .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Bonds, Other_Private), names_to = "creditor_class", values_to = "sum_mn") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = sum_mn, fill = creditor_class)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.85, position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Bonds" = "#d6604d", "Other_Private" = "#fddbc7"), name = "Creditor Class") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar_format(suffix = "M")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1990, 2025, 5)) +
  labs(title = "N2: Private Arrears by Creditor Class (sum)",
       subtitle = "Principal + interest, US$ millions",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```
